bangkokbeasts.name: BangkokBeasts
bangkokbeasts.blurb: Annual Bangkok rock showcase. Fifth edition — Furbidden Vault — lands 14 Nov 2026 at Mr.FOX.
bangkokbeasts.long: BangkokBeasts is the annual multi-band rock showcase hosted at Mr.FOX Live House. Previous editions (2025: The Furtune Teller) have sold out the room. The 2026 edition, Furbidden Vault, is scheduled for Saturday, 14 November 2026.

bittersweet.name: Bitter Sweet
bittersweet.blurb: Long-running Thai indie-pop act on tour.
bittersweet.long: Bitter Sweet is a long-running Thai indie-pop band with a dedicated following across Southeast Asia. Their 2026 Bangkok date is 9 May at Marshall Livehouse.

raychen.name: Ray Chen
raychen.blurb: Award-winning Taiwanese-Australian violinist on a recital tour.
raychen.long: Ray Chen is an internationally acclaimed violinist whose recital tours routinely sell out major halls. His Bangkok date is Sunday, 7 June 2026 at Prince Mahidol Hall, Salaya.

httyd.name: How To Train Your Dragon — In Concert
httyd.blurb: John Powell's score performed live to the full feature film.
httyd.long: The touring live-to-picture production of How To Train Your Dragon pairs the full feature film with John Powell's score performed live by a full orchestra. Bangkok date: 16 May 2026 at Prince Mahidol Hall.

squareenix.name: Music of Square Enix
squareenix.blurb: Symphonic performance of Square Enix's best-known game scores.
squareenix.long: Music of Square Enix is a touring symphonic programme featuring the publisher's most recognisable game scores, including Final Fantasy and Kingdom Hearts selections. Bangkok: 18 July 2026 at TCC.

dexcore.name: DEXCORE
dexcore.blurb: Tokyo-based J-rock band. Played Mr.FOX in 2024.
dexcore.long: DEXCORE is a Tokyo-based J-rock band. Their Bangkok date at Mr.FOX Live House was Saturday, 3 August 2024.

jupiter.name: Jupiter
jupiter.blurb: Symphonic visual-kei band. Played Mr.FOX in 2025.
jupiter.long: Jupiter is a Japanese symphonic visual-kei band. Their Bangkok date at Mr.FOX Live House was Saturday, 2 August 2025.

hizaki.name: HIZAKI × Kaya
hizaki.long: HIZAKI × Kaya — Grace Addict — performed at Mr.FOX Live House on 30 November 2024 as part of their Bangkok date.
